name: computer-use
description: Persistent stdio MCP server exposing the Anthropic computer-use action surface (screenshot, click, move, keyboard, clipboard, batch) against the agent desktop on DISPLAY=:10. Scaffold + dispatch base (SCRUM-1397); the individual tool bodies land in SCRUM-1400..1405 and engine hosting in SCRUM-1406.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture the active display (DISPLAY=:10) and return a base64-encoded PNG. Implemented in SCRUM-1397 as the proof action.

tools.name: zoom
tools.description: Capture and return a magnified PNG of a sub-region of the screen.

region.description: [x, y, width, height] region to magnify.

tools.name: left_click
tools.description: Left-click at a coordinate.

coordinate.description: [x, y] in the model coordinate space (scaled to the screen).

text.description: Optional modifier key(s) to hold during the click, e.g. 'ctrl' or 'shift+alt'.

tools.name: right_click
tools.description: Right-click at a coordinate.

coordinate.description: [x, y] in the model coordinate space (scaled to the screen).

text.description: Optional modifier key(s) to hold during the click, e.g. 'ctrl' or 'shift+alt'.

tools.name: middle_click
tools.description: Middle-click at a coordinate.

coordinate.description: [x, y] in the model coordinate space (scaled to the screen).

text.description: Optional modifier key(s) to hold during the click, e.g. 'ctrl' or 'shift+alt'.

tools.name: double_click
tools.description: Double left-click at a coordinate.

coordinate.description: [x, y] in the model coordinate space (scaled to the screen).

text.description: Optional modifier key(s) to hold during the click, e.g. 'ctrl' or 'shift+alt'.

tools.name: triple_click
tools.description: Triple left-click at a coordinate.

coordinate.description: [x, y] in the model coordinate space (scaled to the screen).

text.description: Optional modifier key(s) to hold during the click, e.g. 'ctrl' or 'shift+alt'.

tools.name: mouse_move
tools.description: Move the pointer to a coordinate without clicking.

coordinate.description: [x, y] in the model coordinate space (scaled to the screen).

tools.name: left_click_drag
tools.description: Press the left button at start_coordinate (or the current position) and drag to coordinate before releasing.

start_coordinate.description: [x, y] in the model coordinate space (scaled to the screen).

coordinate.description: [x, y] in the model coordinate space (scaled to the screen).

tools.name: scroll
tools.description: Scroll in a direction by an amount at a coordinate.

coordinate.description: [x, y] in the model coordinate space (scaled to the screen).

tools.name: left_mouse_down
tools.description: Press and hold the left mouse button (released later by left_mouse_up). Requires the persistent session.

coordinate.description: [x, y] in the model coordinate space (scaled to the screen).

tools.name: left_mouse_up
tools.description: Release a left mouse button held by left_mouse_down.

coordinate.description: [x, y] in the model coordinate space (scaled to the screen).

tools.name: type
tools.description: Type a string of text at the current focus.

tools.name: key
tools.description: Press a key or chord using xdotool key syntax, e.g. 'Return', 'ctrl+s', 'alt+Tab'.

repeat.description: Number of times to press the key/chord (xdotool --repeat); defaults to 1.

tools.name: hold_key
tools.description: Hold a key (or chord) down for a duration in seconds.

duration.description: Seconds to hold (may be up to ~100s).

tools.name: read_clipboard
tools.description: Read the X clipboard contents (via xclip).

tools.name: write_clipboard
tools.description: Write text to the X clipboard (via xclip).

tools.name: request_access
tools.description: Request a session grant for one or more applications (Linux stub: auto-grants and returns screenshotFiltering=false; the real grant model lands with the service engine).

tools.name: list_granted_applications
tools.description: Return the set of applications currently granted desktop access (Linux stub: echoes the granted set).

tools.name: open_application
tools.description: Launch or focus a desktop application by name.

tools.name: switch_display
tools.description: Switch the display the session targets, e.g. ':10'.

tools.name: computer_batch
tools.description: Run a sequence of computer-use actions in order and return one combined result.

tools.name: wait
tools.description: Wait for a duration in seconds (then optionally screenshot).

tools.name: cursor_position
tools.description: Return the current cursor [x, y] in model coordinates.
